fields.summary: Yarn Service: When all the components of a service have restart policy NEVER then initiation of service upgrade should fail

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: * If all the components are NEVER, we can error out at the service level upgrade command itself and say upgrade not allowed. Otherwise for any other permutation/combination we should accept the service-level upgrade call and mark components which can be upgraded.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed
